title: Community Clinic Hosts Free Medical Day
summary: UCDP's Community Clinic opened its doors for a free medical day, serving children and families from across the area.
content:
UCDP's Community Clinic recently hosted a free medical day, providing health services to children and families who cannot afford private healthcare.

## Services Provided

During the free day, the clinic offered general consultations, immunisations, deworming, nutritional assessments, and basic medication — all at no cost.

## About the Clinic

The UCDP Community Clinic provides free healthcare to children under 18 and supports families with basic medical needs. It operates in partnership with qualified health workers and volunteer medical professionals.
